cases.prompt: autoplan — run all the reviews on this plan automatically and make the decisions for me.

assertions.text: Reads the full CEO, design, eng, and DX review skills from disk and runs them sequentially.
Auto-decides intermediate questions using the 6 decision principles instead of asking 15-30 questions.
Produces a consolidated GSTACK REVIEW REPORT of the review outcomes.

cases.prompt: 이 플랜 자동으로 전체 리뷰 돌려줘. 중간 질문 없이 알아서 결정해.

assertions.text: Runs the review pipeline without stopping for 15-30 intermediate questions, preferring complete options per the Completeness Principle.
Invokes the CEO/design/eng/DX review skills sequentially as an auto-review pipeline.
Applies the 6 decision principles to resolve each review decision.
